name: Pork or Lamb Sasaties
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Onions, chopped and cooked - clear in 1/4 cup butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Stew a cup of dried apricots until soft, then pass through a food mill.
2. Add water to make 1 1/2 cups. Stir in vinegar, curry powder, and onions (already cooked with butter).
3. Season with salt to taste. If needed for heat, add a dash of Tabasco or cayenne.
4. Marinate 1 to 1 1/2 inch cubes of pork, lamb, or mutton for 12 hours using the prepared marinade.
5. Preheat broiler and cook the marinated meat until done.
6. Use the marinade as basting sauce during cooking.
